notes: All India, rural + urban combined, usual status (PS+SS), age 15+. Regular wages and casual wages are annual averages of four quarterly observations. Worker distribution uses the annual (full-year) figures from the API. Regular wages = average monthly earnings (₹) from salaried employment. Casual wages = average daily earnings (₹) from casual work. Self-employment = average gross monthly earnings (₹). Worker distribution = % share of each type among all workers.

regularWages.note: Average wage/salary earnings per calendar month from regular wage/salaried employment (₹)

casualWages.note: Average wage earnings per day from casual labour work other than public works (₹/day)

selfEmpEarnings.note: Average gross earnings during last 30 days from self-employment (₹/month)

workerDist.note: Percentage distribution of workers by broad employment status — All India, rural+urban, PS+SS, all industries
